home.eyebrow: Free to play · No download needed
home.heroSub: Bridge, Rummy, Spades, Hearts — beautifully designed, real opponents, live tournaments. Play from any device, any time.

gamesSection.title: Every great card game, in one place
gamesSection.sub: All games are free to play against real opponents worldwide.

bridge.desc: The ultimate card game. Bidding, strategy, and partnership across 4 players.

rummy.desc: Build melds and go out first. Fast, satisfying, endlessly replayable.

teenPatti.desc: The royal Indian card game. Classic, Muflis and AK47 variants. तीन पत्ती

solitaire.desc: Klondike Solitaire. Play at your own pace, any time.

spades.desc: Team up, bid your tricks, and outplay the opposition.

poker.desc: Texas Hold'em with fun chips. No real money, all the strategy.

howItWorks.title: Up and playing in 60 seconds
howItWorks.sub: No downloads, no installs, no credit card.

steps.title: Create a free account
steps.desc: Sign up with email or Google. Under a minute. Your stats are saved from game one.

steps.title: Pick your game
steps.desc: Choose from Bridge, Rummy, Spades, Hearts, or Solitaire. Live lobbies always have players waiting.

steps.title: Join or create a table
steps.desc: Jump into an open game or create a private room. Invite friends with a link.

steps.title: Play and level up
steps.desc: Your rating updates after every game. Climb the leaderboard and join weekly tournaments.

pricing.title: Always free to play
pricing.sub: Go ad-free and unlock the full experience for less than a coffee a month.

footer.copy: © 2026 CardGamers.io — Play card games online free. Built for card players everywhere.
